title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.740 - State not to contribute to system, exception
text:
70.740.  State not to contribute to system, exception. — The state of Missouri shall not contribute directly or indirectly to finance the system, except those amounts which the political subdivision may receive from time to time under a law or laws providing for a general apportionment of political subdivision moneys throughout the state.
(L. 1967 p. 141 § 29)
